OF | Zebra Technologies | | # 1. **OVERVIEW** This work instruction provides directions on correctly processing excess material from a work order back to stock. ## 2. **UNPACK STATION** **1.** Before starting a new WIP job, reference the WIP Traveler to determine if any parts marked with Backflush "BF" and negative "-" quantity will be removed units. ![](_page_0_Picture_5.jpeg) - **2.** After the last piece of the current WIP job has been completed in MWA, reference the WIP traveler for the part with "BF" and a negative "-" quantity. - **3.** If there is a negative quantity, proceed to the steps below. - **4.** If there is no "BF" negative quantity on the WIP Traveler, inform the supervisor for further directions. # 3. **RECONFIGURATION MATERIAL WORKBENCH** - **1.** Open Oracle ERP. - **2.** Login with your Zebra username and password. - **3.** Select ZTC Reconfiguration, then Inquiry, then Material Workbench - **4.** Check the box and click Run for the application run. ![](_page_0_Picture_15.jpeg) **5.** Enter TX4 or Locate TX4 organization from the drop-down menu. ![](_page_0_Picture_17.jpeg) *This document contains proprietary information which is the exclusive property of Zebra Technologies Corp.* ![](_page_1_Figure_0.jpeg) **6.** In Subinventory, enter RMF1. ![](_page_1_Picture_2.jpeg) **7.** In Item/Revision, enter the part number in the WIP Traveler with a negative quantity and hit enter. ![](_page_1_Picture_4.jpeg) - **8.** The Material Workbench screen will display the on-hand quantity to keep. - ✓ Expand the screen to view the quantity. - ✓ Make a note of the Locator; you will need the location for Repack and Pack stations. ![](_page_1_Figure_8.jpeg) - ✓ Request a supervisor material quantity verification to ensure material quantity is not for another open order. - **9.** Proceed to Line 10 to print a part label with the quantity from the WIP Traveler using Zebra Designer. - ✓ Ensure ESD items are maintained in ESD packaging.

## **CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION WORK INSTRUCTIONS** Zebra Technologies **WIP JOB - BACKFLUSH Work Instruction No. Revision No. 01 Site Code WI03 Page 3 OF 9** ✓ 1 part per bag and label each bag accordingly. ![](_page_2_Picture_2.jpeg) ![](_page_2_Picture_3.jpeg) **10.** If there are more negative quantities for the part on the traveler, click on the flashlight and repeat steps 1-10. # 4. **REPACK STATION** **1.** Log into MWA with your credentials. ![](_page_2_Picture_7.jpeg) **2.** From the Responsibilities Menu, select ZTC Reconfiguration Mobile Apps TX4 ![](_page_2_Picture_9.jpeg) | CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION | | | | | | |----------------------------------|------------------|------|------|--------------|--------------------| | WORK INSTRUCTIONS | | | | | | | WIP

OF | Zebra Technologies | - **3.** In the ZTC Reconfiguration Mobile Apps TX4, select Other Transactions. - **4**. In Other Transactions, select Sub Transfer. ![](_page_3_Picture_3.jpeg) - **5**. In Org Code, enter TX4 and press enter. - **6**. In the Item field, enter the part number and press enter. - **7**. In the From Sub field, enter RMF1 and press enter. - **8**. In the Loc field, enter the locator from the Material Workbench screen (i.e., R6.001.001.00) and press enter twice. ![](_page_3_Picture_8.jpeg) *This document contains proprietary information which is the exclusive property of Zebra Technologies Corp.* ![](_page_4_Figure_0.jpeg) **9**. Enter the negative quantity on the current WIP traveler and press enter. ![](_page_4_Picture_2.jpeg) **10**. In the To Sub field, enter RMF2 and press enter. ![](_page_4_Picture_4.jpeg) **11**. In the To Loc field, enter the locator number (i.e., R6.001.001.00) from the Material Workbench screen and press enter. ![](_page_4_Picture_6.jpeg) - **12**. Click Done. - **13**. Repeat steps 1-12 for the remaining parts tote. Once all parts are sub-transferred, start the Pack process. ![](_page_5_Picture_0.jpeg) # 5. **PACK PARTS ONTO LPN** **1.** Log into MWA with your credentials. ![](_page_5_Picture_3.jpeg) **2.** From the Responsibilities Menu, select ZTC Reconfiguration Mobile Apps TX4

OF | Zebra Technologies | - **4.** In the Other Transactions screen, select LPN Transactions. - **5.** In the LPN Transactions screen, select Pack. ![](_page_6_Picture_3.jpeg) **6.** In the Org Code field, enter TX4 and press enter. ![](_page_6_Picture_5.jpeg) **7.** In the To LPN field, scan a new LPN. ![](_page_6_Picture_7.jpeg) ![](_page_7_Figure_0.jpeg) - **8.** In the Sub field, enter RMF2 and press enter. - **9.** In the Loc field, enter the locator and press enter. - **10.** In the Item field, enter the part number and press enter twice. ![](_page_7_Figure_4.jpeg) - **11.** In the quantity field, enter the BF quantity and press enter. - **12.** Click on Pack to complete the transaction. - **13.** Place the new LPN on the packed part. - ✓ Each part must be packed on its own LPN. - **14.** Repeat steps 1-14 for any remaining parts. - **15.** When the process is complete for all the parts, place part or tote with parts in Outtake Lane for pick up. # 6. **REFERENCES** ![](_page_7_Figure_12.jpeg) | Document # | Document Title | | | |------------|----------------|--|--| | N/A | N/A | | | ## 7. **REVISION HISTORY** | CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION | | | | | |------------------------------------------------|-----------|---------|--------------------|--| | WORK INSTRUCTIONS
